info.title: Noether API
info.description: Public REST + WebSocket gateway for the Noether decentralized perpetual exchange on Stellar / Soroban.

get.description: Liveness + config probe. Reports uptime, the resolved contract addresses this process actually serves (env override vs baked manifest — D-4), and how stale the indexer read-side is (age of the last indexed ledger).

Per-asset open interest (long / short / net, from the open-positions projection) and 24h traded volume (position_opened + realized position_closed / liquidated notional). All amounts are i128 decimal strings with 7-decimal USDC precision.
List all supported markets with current oracle prices.
Single market detail with current oracle price.
All supported asset prices read live from the Noeracle shim contract.
Current oracle price for a single asset.
Raw decoded contract events captured by the indexer. Phase 3 surfaces this directly; trade and candle projections land in Phase 3.1.
Public — reports whether key issuance is currently gated to a closed-beta allowlist, and optionally whether the supplied address is on it.

post.description: Issue a one-time challenge string the wallet must sign before an API key can be created.
Exchange a signed challenge for a freshly minted API key + secret.

get.description: List all API keys owned by the authenticated key holder.

delete.description: Revoke an API key. Only the owner can revoke their own keys.

get.description: Identity and tier of the authenticated API key holder.
Decoded contract events whose payload references the authenticated owner address.
Open positions for the authenticated owner (from the indexer positions projection), plus the owner's position events (position_opened, position_closed, position_liquidated).
Order-related events for the authenticated owner.

post.description: Build an unsigned, simulated, prepared Soroban transaction for the requested trading op. The trader is fixed to the authenticated key owner.

Submit a signed Soroban transaction (base64 XDR) and poll until SUCCESS, FAILED, or pollTimeoutMs (default 30s). Resubmitting the same XDR is idempotent: a DUPLICATE is polled by hash and the prior result returned. When the RPC queue is full the response is 503 with a Retry-After header. FAILED transactions include the decoded Noether contract error number + name when one is present in the diagnostic events.

get.description: List all vaults the indexer knows about (newest first). Filter by `leader`.
Detailed view of a single vault.
Leader open/close trade history for a vault, newest first. Each row records a leader_open or leader_close event emitted by the vault_factory contract.
Deposit history for a vault, newest first.
Withdraw history for a vault, newest first.
Leader profit-share claim history for a vault.
Resolve a referral code to its referrer (public).

Look up a referrer profile by Stellar address (public). Returns the row from the referrers projection table, or 404 if the address has never registered a code. Same shape as /v1/referral/me, just queried by address instead of by authed owner.
Returns the referral state of the authenticated owner — both their own referrer row (if any) and the binding they hold as a referee (if any).
Trades the authenticated owner has earned referral fees on.
Claim history for the authenticated owner as referrer.

Currently open positions on the market, optionally filtered by trader. Materialized from position_opened minus position_closed/liquidated events. Use this to avoid iterating every on-chain position id (slow for clients who only care about one trader, like the /trade leader-mode panel).

Trailing 14-day traded notional for a wallet (public). Sums position size over position_opened and position_closed events in the window — mirrors the market contract's rolling VolumeRecord used for fee tiers (liquidations record no volume). Feeds the OrderPanel fee-tier preview.

Recent realized trades (position_closed / position_liquidated events), newest first. Size, asset, direction, and entry price are joined from the matching position_opened event; null when the open predates the indexer history.

OHLC candles for an asset, oldest-first. Native Noeracle candles built by the indexer aggregator; transparently falls back to Binance reference candles when the venue has none yet for that asset/interval (see the "source" field).
Trader leaderboard from the indexer projections. Rank by lifetime realized PnL (`sort=pnl`, default) or traded notional (`sort=volume`). Durable replacement for the web cron that re-scanned Horizon.
